title: Giga Sphere
description: Sphere • A high-grade sphere. Good for capturing strong Pals.

title: Hyper Sphere
description: Sphere • A very high-grade sphere. Essential for late-game captures.

title: Legendary Sphere
description: Sphere • The ultimate sphere. Almost guarantees capture of any Pal.

title: Mega Sphere
description: Sphere • A stronger sphere. Capable of capturing mid-level Pals.

title: Pal Sphere
description: Sphere • A device for capturing Pals. Low success rate for higher level Pals.

title: Ultra Sphere
description: Sphere • An extremely powerful sphere. Even high-level Pals are hard to miss.

title: Ancient Civilization Parts
description: Material • Rare parts found in dungeons and from bosses.

title: High Quality Pal Oil
description: Material • Obtained from certain Pals. Used for making polymers.

title: Ore
description: Material • Raw metal ore. Can be smelted into Ingots.

title: Pal Fluids
description: Material • Obtained from Water-type Pals. Used for making cement.

title: Stone
description: Material • Basic building material obtained from rocks.

title: Wood
description: Material • Basic building material obtained from trees.

title: Cake
description: Food • Required for breeding Pals. Pals love it!
